---
title: "Contact"
---

I'm open to conversations on research collaborations, technical consulting, and role-fit discussions &mdash; with industry research-scientist and applied-scientist roles currently a primary focus, and national-lab positions also in scope. The fastest path is email.

::: {.grid}
::: {.card}
### Email

[shobhan21 [at] gmail.com](mailto:shobhan21@gmail.com?subject=Website%20inquiry%20%E2%80%94%20)  
[shobhan-roy [at] uiowa.edu](mailto:shobhan-roy@uiowa.edu?subject=Website%20inquiry%20%E2%80%94%20)
:::

::: {.card}
### Profiles

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shobhan-roy)  
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=bvv9o2cAAAAJ&hl=en)  
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9361-5367)
:::

::: {.card}
### Location

Iowa City, IA, USA
:::
:::
